<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.44.4-Solothurn">
  <identifier></identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language></language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title></title>
  <abstract></abstract>
  <links/>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["UTM zone 48S",BASEGEOGCRS["UTM zone 48S",DATUM["UTM zone 48S",ELLIPSOID["UTM zone 48S",6378137,298.257223563,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1,ID["EPSG",9001]]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8901]]],CONVERSION["UTM zone 48S",METHOD["Transverse Mercator",ID["EPSG",9807]],PARAMETER["Latitude of natural origin",0,ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8801]],PARAMETER["Longitude of natural origin",105,ANGLEUNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8802]],PARAMETER["Scale factor at natural origin",0.9996,SCALEUNIT["unity",1],ID["EPSG",8805]],PARAMETER["False easting",500000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8806]],PARAMETER["False northing",10000000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8807]],ID["EPSG",16148]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["easting",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1,ID["EPSG",9001]]],AXIS["northing",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1,ID["EPSG",9001]]]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=utm +zone=48 +south +ellps=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs +type=crs</proj4>
      <srsid>0</srsid>
      <srid>0</srid>
      <authid></authid>
      <description>UTM zone 48S</description>
      <projectionacronym></projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>PARAMETER:6378137:6356752.31424517929553986</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent/>
</qgis>
